claim_lock_ttl_minutes.description: Minutes a claim lock is held before the sweeper expires it. Default: 15.

per_field_confidence_threshold.description: Fields with AI confidence below this value (0-100) are highlighted for review and auto-focused when the station opens. Default: 70.

queue_order_policy.description: Order in which documents appear in the claim queue. Default: fifo.

autofocus_first_low_confidence.description: When 'on', the station auto-focuses the first field below the confidence threshold when a document is opened. Default: on.

keyboard.next_field.description: Single letter key to move to the next field (default: j).

keyboard.prev_field.description: Single letter key to move to the previous field (default: k).
